name: Web Research & Information Gathering
description: Web research toolkit for systematic information gathering, source evaluation, and synthesis from online sources. Supports URL fetching with content extraction, multi-source summarization, and provenance tracking. Each retrieved source is annotated with domain authority, publication date, and retrieval timestamp to support reproducibility and bias assessment in research workflows.
uncertaintyModel: Web source reliability assessed by domain authority, publication date, and cross-reference count. Claims supported by multiple independent sources receive higher confidence scores. Temporal decay applied to time-sensitive information. Bias indicators flagged when source diversity is low or when retrieved content shows strong sentiment polarity.
